creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 149535
Patch to update graphics/maim to 2.3.36

Hi,
I am the maintainer of the FreeBSD port graphics/maim. I have a patch to update the graphics/maim port to it's latest version: 2.3.36. I also have the Poudriere build log, and this log will get uploaded shortly.
Thanks,
Neel
